home.description: Connecting Indian landowners with farmers who need land. Find the perfect plot for farming or list your land for rent – all in one trusted platform.
home.featuresSubtext: Our platform makes renting agricultural land simple, secure, and accessible for every Indian farmer.
home.card1Desc: Search land by location, soil type, crop suitability, area, and budget with ease.
home.card2Desc: All land listings are verified by our admin team for authenticity and trust.
home.card3Desc: Connect directly with landowners. No middlemen, no hidden fees – complete transparency.
home.card4Desc: Fully responsive platform accessible anytime, anywhere on any device.
home.card5Desc: Browse agricultural land listings across multiple Indian states and districts.
home.card6Desc: Upload documents securely and get support from our dedicated team anytime.
home.farmerStep1Desc: Sign up with your details and verify via OTP.
home.farmerStep2Desc: Fill in land area, crops, soil, location, rent & upload photos.
home.farmerStep3Desc: Our team reviews your listing for authenticity.
home.buyerStep2Desc: Narrow down by state, district, soil, crop, and budget.
home.buyerStep3Desc: Sign up to see complete contact details.
home.buyerStep4Desc: Call or message the landowner directly.
home.ctaHeading: Ready to Start Your Farming Journey?
home.ctaSubtext: Join thousands of Indian farmers and landowners who trust Rent Farming for connecting land with opportunity.

register.tagline: Create your account and start your farming journey.

footer.brandDescription: India's trusted agricultural land rental marketplace. Connecting landowners with farmers for better productivity.

faq.pageSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about using Rent Farming.
faq.a1: Rent Farming is an online marketplace that connects Indian landowners who want to rent out their agricultural land with buyers/tenants who are interested in farming on rented land.
faq.q2: How do I register as a farmer/landowner?
faq.a2: Click on "Register", select the "Farmer" role, fill in your details including your 7/12 Survey Number, verify your phone number via OTP, and you're ready to list your land.
faq.q3: How do I list my land for rent?
faq.a3: After logging in as a farmer, go to your dashboard and click "Add Land". Fill in the land details – area, soil type, crops, location, expected rent – and upload photos and your 7/12 document. Your listing will be reviewed by an admin before it becomes visible.
faq.q4: How long does admin approval take?
faq.a4: Our admin team reviews listings within 24-48 hours. Once approved, your land will be visible to all buyers on the platform.
faq.q5: Why is the farmer's phone number masked?
faq.a5: For security and privacy, farmer phone numbers are partially masked for visitors who are not logged in. Registered and logged-in buyers can see the full contact number.
faq.q6: Can I list multiple land plots?
faq.a6: Yes! One farmer account can add multiple land listings. Each listing goes through the admin approval process independently.
faq.a7: For farmers, a 7/12 document (land record extract) is recommended to verify ownership. You can upload images and PDF documents during the listing process.
faq.q8: Is there any fee for using the platform?
faq.a8: Currently, Rent Farming is free to use for both landowners and buyers. There are no listing fees or commission charges.
faq.q9: How do I search for land?
faq.a9: Use the "Browse Lands" page to explore approved listings. You can filter by state, district, village, soil type, crop type, area range, and rent budget.
faq.q10: What if my listing gets rejected?
faq.a10: If your listing is rejected, you will see the rejection reason on your dashboard. You can edit the listing to address the issues and resubmit for approval.

contact.pageSubtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.successToast: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We will get back to you soon.
